cc:Work.dc:title: Application Icon Sprite Sheet
cc:Work.dc:description: A collection of UI icons for the main application interface including navigation, user, notifications, search, and favorites.

cc:Agent.dc:title: Copyright 2024 Atelier Studio. All rights reserved.

symbol.title: Settings Gear
symbol.desc: A gear icon representing settings and configuration options for the application. Features eight evenly-spaced teeth around a circular center with a hollow core.

symbol.title: User Profile
symbol.desc: A user silhouette icon showing a person's head and shoulders, commonly used for profile and account sections. The head is rendered as a circle and the body as curved shoulders.

symbol.title: Notifications Bell
symbol.desc: A bell-shaped notification icon with a clapper at the bottom and a small circle notification dot at the top right. Used to indicate alerts and notifications in the interface.

symbol.title: Home
symbol.desc: A house-shaped icon representing the home page or dashboard. Features a pitched roof with chimney, a front door, and a window. Used for primary navigation back to the main view.

symbol.title: Search
symbol.desc: A magnifying glass icon used for search functionality. Consists of a circular lens rendered with arc commands and an angled handle using line segments. The lens has a subtle glare highlight.

symbol.title: Favorite Heart
symbol.desc: A heart-shaped icon used for favorites, likes, and wishlists. The heart is constructed using cubic bezier curves to create smooth lobes and a pointed bottom. Includes subtle highlight and shadow details.
